scenarios.description: children() returns cached child list on second invocation without modifications (cache-hit branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has >0 Element children and children() called once to populate cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns same list instance as cache

scenarios.description: children() refreshes cache when childNodes modCount mismatches stash (cache-invalidate branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element has >0 children and cache populated, then a new child appended
scenarios.expectedResult: children() after appending returns updated list of all children (cache invalidated)
pseudocode: Elements first = parent.children();  // cache stash modCount
